suggestions.title: Consolidate yesterday’s two RBM42 Word drafts into one final submission file
suggestions.description: This project now has both `rbm42-hcc.docx` and `rbm42-hcc-academic.docx`, plus rendered pages from June 21, 2026. Codex can diff the layouts and content, keep the stronger version, and regenerate one clean final `.docx`/PDF package.
suggestions.prompt: 请比较 `outputs/rbm42-hcc.docx`、`outputs/rbm42-hcc-academic.docx` 以及对应的渲染结果，帮我合并成一个最终提交版 Word：保留内容最完整的正文、参考文献和表格，统一标题层级、字体、段落、页码和表格样式，然后重新生成 docx 和可预览 PDF。

suggestions.title: Turn the RBM42 review into a one-page opening report roadmap
suggestions.description: The review already contains a direct-evidence gap, four mechanism hypotheses, and a clear validation path. Codex can extract that into a concise导师汇报版 roadmap instead of making you reframe the whole review by hand.
suggestions.prompt: 基于当前 `outputs/rbm42-hcc.md`，帮我再产出一份适合开题/导师汇报的一页式研究路线图，内容包括：研究背景一句话、核心科学问题、3到4个创新点、关键机制假说、实验技术路线、预期结果和风险点，要求中文、学术、可直接复制到汇报材料。

suggestions.title: Add an evidence-graded table before RBM42-HCC claims get challenged
suggestions.description: Your provenance note dated June 21, 2026 explicitly says there is still no direct functional RBM42-HCC paper. Codex can harden the review by adding an evidence-grading table that separates proven RBM42 biology from HCC-specific inference.
suggestions.prompt: 请基于 `outputs/rbm42-hcc.md` 和 `outputs/rbm42-hcc.provenance.md`，帮我做一次“证据链加固”修订：新增一个表格，明确区分“RBM42已被直接证明的功能”“HCC中已知RBP机制”“RBM42在HCC中的推断性假说”，并同步收紧正文里可能被认为表述过强的句子，最后输出修订后的 markdown 和 Word。
